response.justification: The candidate is a versatile, experienced senior engineer with strong testing culture, open-source contributions, and mentoring experience, but he does not meet the core minimum qualifications for this role. The position requires 8 years of C++ experience; his C++ exposure is limited to a ~7-month stint at National Instruments and a thesis project. His large-scale distributed systems experience (low-latency DLang services at Sociomantic) is relevant but spans roughly 2 years, short of the 5-year requirement, and he has no demonstrated production cloud-platform architecture ownership or formal technical leadership of cloud/DevOps engineers.
strengths: Broad full-stack and systems experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend services
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing tools authorship, and active mentoring via workshops and courses
Hands-on low-latency, high-scale experience (micro-services handling millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic)
concerns: Falls far short of the required 8 years of C++ experience (roughly under 1 year professionally)
Limited depth in cloud compute platform architecture and large-scale infrastructure relative to the 5-year requirement
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers as preferred by the JD
